title: orchis × bivonae
intro: Orchis × bivonae, also known as the Bivoni's orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that combines the characteristics of two parent species, Orchis italica and Orchis simia. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Orchis × bivonae include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are administered to alleviate various health conditions.
